title: Tools Reimagined
body:
![Render](https://i.gyazo.com/2bc94493b4f0029c72279ad0cf51f4af.png)

### This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

Tools Reimagined is a complete remake to our trusty tools with a fresh new look! These new textures should hopefully make your tools a "pop" while still feeling a bit more realistic yet keeping that cartoony charm.

The tools now also slightly change depending on the material they are made out of, no more simple tool recolors for all materials! Wood tools will now be a lot more crude looking versus iron, while the iron will be more crude compared to diamond. Diamond will now also look a lot more shiny and crystal-like over the other metal tools!

![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/a9e4e35e590937542b731f1fd1ab9a63.png) 

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)
